creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks!

With the new changes, portlint complains a bit more:

WARN: Makefile: OCTAVE is listed in OPTIONS_DEFINE, but no
PORT_OPTIONS:MOCTAVE appears.
WARN: Makefile: MATLAB is listed in OPTIONS_DEFINE, but no
PORT_OPTIONS:MMATLAB appears.
WARN: Makefile: [18]: possible direct use of command "gmake" found. use
${GMAKE} instead.

Nothing to worry about, it seems...
